name: Swiss Re Ltd
description: Swiss Re Ltd is a leading global provider of reinsurance, insurance, and other forms of insurance-based risk transfer. Founded in 1863 and headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, the company operates through a global network to help clients manage complex risks, ranging from natural catastrophes and climate change to aging populations and cybercrime. By anticipating and managing risk, Swiss Re plays a vital role in enabling economic growth and societal progress, providing the financial resilience necessary for businesses and governments to navigate an increasingly uncertain world.
